text: this is my favorite starbucks the service is incredibly fast even when they are croweded with a long line the staff never falters and drinks are always excellent and come out quickly if there s something wrong with your drink they will make you another one without giving you a problem about it lots of seating inside and a few tables outside the baristas are excellent and they often times remember my drink as soon as i walk in the door my only gripe is that the music in the evening gets a too loud for a coffee shop and the staff likes to play weird s music perhaps because the staff likes it the staff also seems annoyed when you ask them to turn the music down this shouldn t be club starbucks
very good overall located where the burger king used to be and they have a clover brewing system too

the refreshers so so good and feels lite i can break a tooth chomping on the ice to get to the dehydrated strawberries floating around in the drink i also shake the empty cup viciously until every drop is gone but i don t care the drinks flavors are on point and it s a nice change of pace from a warm coffee plus they ll always give pup cups starbucks is wonderful

i have been goi g to this location at least times a week before covid started and also have been using the online app lately the service has been less than par i work in the service industry and understand the struggles the service at this location has drastically declined in the last few months i will be looking elsewhere for my coffee now sorry sometimes the truth hurts

i had to sit down and write this review because after a few times of having my order be wrong in the drive thru i couldn t not say something i get the easiest order you can get trenta iced green tea unsweet no water yes i could go to the one downtown but it s hard to park and i have my little one in the car with me and it s just convenient to drive thru i don t even mind the consistently long waits at the drive thru min because i don t have to get out of my car with a kid in pj s i do however get frustrated with my order being wrong and then still having to go inside to change it today they got the teas right but gave me venti a few days ago i got one mango iced tea and one green tea a few days before that i had to go inside because they gave me someone s tea from the mobile order and she got my drive thru order i ve been to so many super busy starbucks and they are hustling to get everyone through in a quick manner and with the right order this one seems to need more espresso or something to speed them up and also some drilling on getting the orders right in spite of being busy nothings worse than going through the drive thru and then having to go inside to fix your order i am very polite and don t usually make a big deal about it but this needs to be handled

before i asked for non fat frappuccino and no whip but they put whip cream on it and then they restarted it but ended up giving me light frappuccino which had the light syrup and tasted really bad i just threw it away today i asked for non fat latte with no whip the same barista added whip and when i told him i don t want whip he did not do the latte again just scooped some of the whip off the top when i asked him are you sure this has no whip cream in it he said it is a drink that has a lot of chocolate in it and a lot of fat in it but i assure you it does not have whip cream in it i know what i m doing and i calculate the calories of chocolate and everything else wow lots of attitude for so much money put into a cup of coffee

having been here quite a few times i suppose it s time for a review i can t say enough good things about the staff i witnessed the longest line known to man this morning and the staff handled it cheerfully there were no signs of stress just the notion that they work as a well oiled machine i never had an order come out wrong but i did knock off a star for the parking lot it s pretty rough especially in the rush hour where everyone is trying to get their caffeine fix

rude and bad service left my drink on the table and never called out my name even when i stood in front of the girl she continued to ignore and failed to mention my drink was waiting i hated spending a single cent at but got a gift card to burn would not go back to this store

it was so bad experience for me because i want to take my birthday gift drink on my birthday but they said that we can not give it we are not starbucks if you are not starbucks why your brand name is starbucks and you sell starbucks coffee and stuff

this is my go to starbucks while i am at work their employees are always friendly and accurately take your order no matter how long the drive thru line the employees handle it pretty quickly i have on occasion tried their pre made sandwiches my favorite is the egg salad the arugula adds a nice depth to this classic there is outside seating overall a great location

i usually have bad experiences here so i go to the goleta location but today i went here for the sake of convenience i am so pleased to say that morgan was the sweetest and provided me with the best service ever amidst a rough finals week she definitely made my day by being so kind and making sure she got my order right i appreciated it so much thank you morgan

the lady works in the counter for making drinks in the morning on sunday seems to be very mean or racist i said to the male employee that i wanted the drink to have no ice and he wrote it on the cup it was understandable that she mistook it for having ice but after i asked her to take the ice out she didn t even say a word with the mean face and took the ice out silently i said thank you to her and she still didn t want to say a word to me with the mean face but she said have a great day with a large smiley face to the white customers before and after me i m wondering if this is the overall starbuck employees attitudes to people with different color

why such a low rating location location location each knocks off one star it s a real shame that there are no cafes or coffee shops in kennett square that are open past on sunday afternoon that s the only reason i headed out to this corporate chain situated in an ugly suburban strip mall i feel dirty spending my money in a place like this like i m playing a role in wrecking the structure of american society that said it really wasn t that bad starbucks is starbucks i had a decent cup of tea and a tasty but overpriced baked good that s par for the course staff were friendly and the atmosphere was tolerable i found the christmas themed decorations a little bit lame and this atmosphere is a bit colder and less cozy than some other starbucks i ve been in but they re all more or less similar get it together kennett square merchants you gotta have something open in the downtown every day of the week when i m in town i ll go there guaranteed maybe the mexican bakery which was open could put some tables out they sure have room for it in their large storefront i d rather give them my money than a starbucks in some butt ugly suburban shopping plaza that s just enriching some sleazy developer

okay this is by far my favorite location the management is wonderful the staff amazing and they even make great drinks i love everything about them and they are always there with a smile drive thru takes a little long but i don t mind since i m just too lazy to walk my butt in there sometimes i have messed up ordering on the app i don t know how many times and they just wave at me and say no worries we got you if i had any new complaint it would be the price and they can t help that love this place
i m a huge fan of starbucks and this was a great one to stop in for it being in such a crowded tourist spot the staff was friendly really enjoyed my latte

this starbucks is closest to me i gave it one star already because of the cold food and even cold coffee i m usually in a rush and i always go via the drive thru my husband wanted a breakfast sandwich i regrettably gave it another try this morning i didn t bother ordering a coffee but two breakfast sandwiches as usual sandwiches are warm to hot on the outside cold not cool but cold on the inside my son has worked at starbucks for years never at this location he told me they must be warming the sandwiches straight from the freezer he said that at the stores he has worked at they take out the sandwiches out of the freezer one day ahead and put them in the refrigerator that way they are not frozen when heated i have on a few occasions spoken to the folks at this store about the cold sandwiches i was advised to order them open faced to make sure they were heated thoroughly but it just doesn t matter either they really are hard frozen to start with or they are ignoring my request to warm them open faced i have no idea luckily this morning i was going back to my office and i heated the sandwiches in our microwave but i hate it when i m on the road and i have to throw it out well i gave it another try for sure no more too bad the staff is very friendly

it s starbucks what else can i say super friendly staff a little cramped space wise they could probaby afford to expand the app makes life easier but seriously a little direction for us semi regulars where do i pick up my mobile order i ve stood there waiting and thinking wait i ordered ahead so i didn t have to wait only to find out that my drink was indeed ready just hidden in the secret mobile order cubby i have a few self described starbucks cult member friends who told me i just need to ask for it when i get there a sign pick up your mobile order here would be helpful but now i know so whatever keep making the peppermint mocha that s my starbucks jam

this place is huuuuuuuuge there is so much seating they should just set up a projector and screen some blockbusters not only is there a ton of seating it comes in all different types round four person tables longer tables with power outlets solo chairs with footrests booths along the walls and backless puffier ottoman like chairs the area with the solo chairs is slightly removed from the rest of the store so you can get your introvert on grab that prime seating behind the merch shelf and get some work done the staff was super friendly the barista did make my flat white a grande instead of venti but he fixed it in no time and gave me the messed up drink as well i love when they do that instead of throwing it away this place is going to be a local haunt for me for sure i hope it stays this great as it gets older

this location has a drive thru but if you use a reuseable cup for a fancy drink they still use a disposable cup until you get to the window go inside instead if you want to not waste the staff seemed a bit distant and not too customer friendly in fact the barista seemed a bit impatient with me while i was deciding how to make my however you want it frappuccino overall nothing too noteworthy but does the job

this is my favorite starbucks the only thing i don t like is the parking lot is too small it s larger than others so most times i have no problem finding a table there is also a separate room that is away from the baristas it makes it a little easier to study

just the best bunch of people at this location the baristas are always quick to make sure our dogs moose ringo get some extra loving special shout out to jack who was more than willing to help me out with a technical difficulty i was having on the starbucks app in the drive thru awesome environment and great service

like every other starbucks near campus this place gets busy the surrounding are quaint like your artsy friend s living room but they get crowded like a house party in no time there s a back room with a long trestle table and several smaller ones well lit by generous windows prime study work spot the front patio is small but gives a great view of university ave and the baristas here are not as ditzy as the on campus starbs

coming from ny and being around a multitude of coffee shops i know a good one when i see one they are incredibly efficient when a lot of these people order weird crazy drinks and i just get an iced red eye and call it a day the drive thru is actually amazing i never heard of a drive thru starbucks before and this is the only one i know like that it s really quick and everyone is so friendly the only thing that kind of is annoying is the parking lot and the location of it how it s not really easy to get into or out of

this is my favorite starbucks in the westshore area because it is a larger locations and away from the mall crowds there is outdoor seating a drive thru and parking in the back there are plenty of outlets along the long bench seat and also outlets along the walls although starbucks is always busy and a little noisy it is my favorite starbucks to work at because there are a lot of tables

this was the first time going to this starbucks and i have never recieved a poorly drink until today i ordered a chai latte and my husband got a white chocolate mocha as we drove away i opened my cup and saw my drink was barely filled of the cup not to mention most of it was foam i decided to check my husband drink to see that his cup was only half filled and the remaining space was just whipped cream i was seriously disappointed if we weren t already on our way back home to clarksville i would have seriously asked for a refund because messing up a drink that bad twice isn t worth trying to remake
really great bucks we are there usually every saturday morning and they are always cheerful and fast this location has become our favorite in nashville

worst customer service at a starbucks i ve ever experienced the servers were rude to the customers i forgot to ask for a water when ordering and was told to get back in a very long line to get a water employees were talk amongst themselves instead of paying attention to customer server asked what i wanted three times because she was not paying attention i will not be returning

i ordered my coffee and breakfast eggs this morning coffee came and then finally minutes after i was able to get someone s attention about my food being skipped barista was unhelpful asked me to order again i showed him my order then proceeded to fill other peoples orders after mine after minutes left after demanding refund and nothing happening i go here days a week very disappointed

i have just left this location and the service was spectacular i was so pleased with the way the staff had handled my order my coffee was perfect even though they were incredibly busy i cannot say enough good things about the am staff
i love heading into this location for the service and beverages it s always so warm and inviting and something about the atmosphere makes it feel like christmas time if that makes sense

this is the best starbucks experience i ve had the young man that was taking my order was so nice i wanted to try the matcha creme frappuccino but was unsure if i would like it he talked to me about it for a minute or so and i agreed to try it out i m glad i did it was really good after i had started drinking it he got my attention and checked on me to make sure i liked it no one has ever done that at any starbucks before he was a really nice guy with excellent customer skills
they are all very nice here but really the only person who know what s she s doing is allison the rest need more training

maybe the worst starbucks there is around they are slow don t do the drinks in the order they receive them and sometimes the order doesn t even come out and you have to go back to the desk to remind them or ask them what happened all they have as an answer is oh i m sorry what was it again i just don t get it

today i was reminded yet again why i stopped going to this starbucks call me optimistic but i thought i d give it a second chance the parking lot is extremely small and crowded even though they added some extra spots the only parking that was available today was in the minute parking spots some other patrons and i were asked to move our cars from these spots so that others could park there i don t mind moving my car but there were no other places to go and the starbucks employee was somewhat rude about it please do yourself a favor if you re in jenkintown and you really want a cup of starbucks coffee just visit the barnes noble across the street save yourself the time and stress

i visited this starbucks for the first time this evening i walked into the store and waited while two baristas made drinks and another barista took drive through orders each one of the baristas saw me but none of them acknowledged me after waiting a few minutes i turned around and walked out i understand being busy but these guys could at least acknowledge that they have a customer in the store a simple good evening we ll be with you in a minute or two would ve gone a long way with me

my go to starbucks i love this location because of the location itself and the always friendly service i m always greeted whenever i walk in the door whether it is busy or slow inside when the weather is just right the tables outdoors are the perfect spots to study or to hang out i recommend anyone who frequents starbucks to utilize the mobile app rewards i love the mobile order feature place your order ahead of time and just pick it up if you re on the go

this is the worse starbucks i ve ever had i don t understand the amount of traffic because the quality is horrible i have giving them multiple tries from cold frappes to hot coffees i ve also tried them years later and still they re horrible i don t recommend this starbucks at all travel a little further to another location save yourself the expensive disappointment

this is my favorite starbucks sandy is awesome she came up with the birthday gift idea gift card in a starbucks cup looooove it bought it for my employees every year plus she always takes good care of her customer sandy is the best
the service is super slow they need to work on that it took me min to get my chocolate muffin warmed up meh
nice little place but the parking is just a pain friendly people great coffee

store looks nice but can be deafeningly loud no sound insulation at all here at after lunch no rush whatsoever and every free table is filthy had to get napkins and literally scrub a table parking lot is tight love the chain poorly thought out location with untrained inattentive staff bummer

this starbucks is right where i work so i stop by frequently service is consistently friendly and nice obviously it depends on the hour how busy it is thus how wiped off tables could be how prepared ya gotta be upon being the next customer helped etc nothing to complain about have always been served well

y all need to step y all s coffee game up cuz y all coffee wack asf i literally went up times because it wasn t what i wanted and somehow y all still managed to fuck up smh i won t be coming back to this one that s for sure

i can not even begin to explain how much it bothers me coming to this location the closest to me each morning only to be screamed at before i get my coffee by the man at the speaker yelling howddyyyyyy partner in the most ridiculous accent i ve ever heard i know you re trying to make it fun but you do it everyday and i am over it please stop or just chill

maybe it was just an off day or maybe it was because of training new people but this was kind of a confusing starbucks experience i guess i might be spoiled because most starbucks locations really get the concept of the customer experience right a quick stop in for a nice chilly frappuccino on this hot afternoon started out a little bit strange when i was the next customer in line and an employee standing at an empty till caught my eye and smiled brightly i started to walk toward her and give her my order and the employee at the other till who had been helping the customer in front of me broke off to reprimand me for trying to cut in front of that customer i felt quite taken aback at the intensity of his response to what was obviously a misunderstanding i could barely even get out the words i m so sorry i thought she was asking me to come up and order when it was my turn for real and not for pretend it became apparent that she was a brand new employee being trained and thus it was no surprise that it was a slightly confusing process to get my card reloaded my items run in and finally paid for no big deal in itself we have all been learners at something at some point in our lives perhaps this brand new employee also learned that it sends a mixed message to customers waiting in line when you make eye contact and smile at them but you are totally not ready for them to actually come up and order however when i picked up my drink it had not been marked correctly so it wasn t quite right however it was close so i just took it and left i clearly needed to consume some of that caffeine before trying to wrap my brain around any more confusion

man reading some of these reviews i feel badly for the baristas they must have to put up with a lot since the store s right next to rittenhouse square anyway this is a perfectly fine starbucks with perfectly fine service for a starbucks if you re feeling on edge maybe go somewhere else because well this is a starbucks and you re not going to be waited on hand and foot but i found the baristas here to be perfectly pleasant despite a rush so it s a star review from me
they have updated and now accept the app staff takes their time to get to know you drinks are always spot on see you soon

a slightly below average starbucks hence the below average star rating they were out of things and it was early in the day the coffee tasted like mud and the staff was particularly out of it usually at a starbucks there s some millennial zombies working who don t know anything and then one employee who knows everything this location seemed to not have the knows everything employee no one could answer my simple questions about the varieties of coffee and a question about the food that should ve been easy dance i asked if they could make me a pot of the blonde coffee and they said no because it was later in the day i often ask them to do that at other starbucks and they have no problem with that at all i realize they stop making the blonde earlier in the day i was super friendly when i asked and they do it at a lot of other locations so it must be indicative of something else i hate to be negative i really do but the place was also not really kept up as far as cleanliness goes it was definitely a bit messy and no one was attending to it there are definitely better choices for your money
i think i m going to love this location clean and cozy and right next to whole foods yes and yes

recognition and thank you to keena at the carpinteria location new barista i was told i had to get a temporary wells fargo debit card and for my second time this week my temp card didn t work on starbucks system nowhere else having issues i didn t have cash but really wanted my usually coffee and sandwich mentioned i live around the corner and will be back with cash to my delight and surprise keena said with a smile don t worry about it i ll put it on my account since i already have it ready have a wonderful day should she have done this probably not encouraged i understand however she took initiative and had empathy made a judgement call i appreciate it treated me as a person and not a transaction i got home and was wondering how much i ve spent at starbucks last two years since i ve moved to carpinteria so i pulled up wells fargo transactions and answer is dollars over at the carpinteria location alone wish keena well at the company tough job but little acts of kindness go a long way good team at the this location i usually keep to myself staff that makes the extra effort like this keep me coming back thank you scott

this starbucks is rumored to be the highest grossing starbucks in the midwest if the drive thru and in house lines are any indication of the accuracy of that statement then they truly are there s nothing i can say about starbucks here that hasn t been said written about etc but i ve been to many a starbucks and this one is well just a great experience at any time of the day the staff is wonderful and always greets the regulars by name seldom do i even have to tell them what my order is they will usually ask if i m having whatever my usual drink is for that period of time and promptly serve it up for me on the very rare occasion that your drink isn t up to your taste standards they want you to tell them they ll gladly remake any order to satisfy their customers the store is clean and well maintained but the configuration could have been given a bit more consideration for example the drive thru lines up right in front of the entrance it creates a considerable amount of traffic and presents a potential hazard for patrons going in out of the building similarly there are a few parking spots right in front of the door beware if parking in these spots due to the way the drive thru wraps around the building and crosses behind these parking slots if you are parked there and need to get out quickly hope to god the drive thru line isn t too long or you re going to be stuck in your parking spot until the line passes by the good thing is the baristas in this starbucks are fast and accurate they generally keep the drive thru line moving at a pretty goods pace that certainly is appreciated when you are short on time they have an outdoor seating area but again it bumps right up against the drive thru line so consequently your conversation is constantly interrupted by customers placing orders or loud cars and stereos enjoying a nice latte right next to a running car isn t the most pleasant experience the indoor seating area is less than adequate sure there are tables and chairs but on a saturday sunday morning they fill up quick leaving you no other option but to sit outside or take your order to go but as i stated aside from these physical shortcomings the exceptional staff more than makes up for it and the product quality speaks for itself

over the last several years i have frequented this location because i have family and friends in the area i am boring i just get a vanilla bean frappuccino or a hot chocolate with whipped cream i too am challenges with the beverage size names and experienced one of the baristas melissa who has waited on my many times before said we also speak english you can use small medium large i thought this was funny because as a non coffee drinker i am not ordering and using the purpose behind the names and descriptions of the beverages because to me a grande should be larger than a venti so i stick to small medium and large ha ha i have been in the store and in the drive thru and have always had a very good experience and they have always been helpful melissa works hard i have seen her be at the front and at the drive thru at the same time and she remembers me when i come in to order and i am not there on a daily basis it is more every few months so kudos

professionalism and customer service is dead this place is exhibit a of this fact i have come here multiple times and each time the attitudes and service are pure shit the girls and i use girls as opposed to women for a reason and age is not that reason who work here have attitudes similar to mine when i m going to the bmv they are unhappy people and incapable of even pretending to know how to properly serve someone on my most recent visit and my last i arrived at open and requested a cold brew coffee the girl said they didn t make cold brew that day i asked why she said no one buys it which is a lie as i alone had gotten it times prior to this occasion i said i buy it then she said this to me who are you lol well i am now the guy who s going to bash you on yelp for being horrible at an entry level customer service job go elsewhere for coffee quills is a great place and not far from the marriott if you have time to make it there

this starbucks was quite clean and pretty there s a gorgeous landscape painting by the restroom and plenty of starbucks objects to buy on the shelves not a lot of sandwiches or wraps to buy though there s other starbucks with bigger displays featuring more foods on their menu and display cases the waitresses attitudes were a bit rushed and they could have heated my family s coffee a bit more my chai tea was hotter than their coffee the chai tea was delicious though i loved how i could add chocolate cinnamon nutmeg and vanilla to my drink myself the little bar had those powdered ingredients ready to add the people in there seemed a bit older than the average clientele at starbuckses overall it was pretty good

when has starbucks ever done me wrong well today this isn t my starbucks i frequent others but was on the west side of town dropping my daughter for a night with her grandma and she requested a vanilla bean frapp we drove thru and i must admit the server speaker was very helpful upbeat and funny and thank the sweet lord they had the horizon chocolate milk for the little one or we might have had an issue so we get our chocolate milk box in a timely fashion but sat waiting for the vanilla frapp for an eternity when passed to us i hand it to said daughter and like any smart person she eats the whipped cream off the top first as we re pulling out of the lot as we re driving she says ewww this tastes awful she said it tasted like drinking just iced milk so my issue is just with this locale long wait and a drink an eight year old turned her nose up at

what s joe pesci s line from lethal weapon you get ed at the drive thru needed a lift to make it home on my daily commute between st pete and orlando so i stopped at the exit starbucks and ordered a chai tea latte two exits west on i i went for my first sip and it was coffee i hate coffee joe pesci was right i wasn t turning around so they got me

just so bad i have numerous stories of nonsense with this store but today s shall be the feature i order a dark roast drip coffee literally all that needs to happen is a cup needs to be placed under the spout and then upon fillage a lid must be applied i waited for about minutes for a mobile order no one checked in i had to ask twice before the barista realized she was not in fact brewing any dark roast the explanation was that they dump regular coffee after am welcome to crazy town in summation be prepared to wait bc this excursion took mins beginning to end
i love my starbucks baristas were friendly the atmosphere was good i spilled my drink and they were happy to remake it

every time i visit this location the staff is really exceptional they are patient accurate and friendly this is a great place to enjoy a cup of coffee or study as it s larger than most other locations my only con is that bc it s on such a busy street the entrances and exits can be a nightmare depending on which direction you need to go
i suppose that this is okay if you need a quick cup of joe before you fly out it serves a purpose and the you get served quickly
great friendly staff and always good drinks and snacks my wife and i had a mocha this morning and i had an egg and sausage sandwich and my wife a chocolate croissant always great highly recommend

although there are several starbucks locations around the country that are open hours now this location will always be the original hour starbucks to me located conveniently right off of the i at the thonotosassa exit this place is a must stop if you are making that typical trek from orlando to tampa or vice versa why you ask well because there is delicious coffee and tea clean restrooms and delectable pastries really what more could you ask for there is even a drive thru for added convenience the size of the starbucks is ideal room for casual seating and lounging but not so huge that it s overcrowded and crazy i think the drive thru option helps prevent that also the location right off of the i note the giant starbucks sign over the highway makes it easy to pull in and out of i ve never experienced any problems here and also i associate it with roadtripping across florida so stars

great location in the commons buildings on penn s campus staff is quick and efficient keep in mind you can use your starbucks card to make a purchase however you cannot use your freebies or any coupons at this location

horrible customer service there was an error in my drink and i let matt aware of it he remade my drink sat it down on the counter and didn t say anything waited for over min and then he says here is your drink i was standing right in front of the counter so there is no way he didn t see me a lady walked up while i was standing there and asked what everything on the counter was mobile orders thrown on the counter without any labels they seem to cater to the drive thru instead of customers standing in the lobby rude

i wish they had a thumbs down or a honestly the worst starbucks i ve been my whole life is ok if they are in the process of hiring or new but not ok not been polite people here are not helping the company grow i don t know how they still open i hope they change this because i love starbucks and i work so close that all i want in the morning is a latte to start my day just thinking it will take minutes to get it makes me regret it and passed on coffee

i have been to many starbucks locations across the country and this is easily my favorite very friendly staff comfortable seating nice environment

now downtown reno only has one starbucks and off south virgina street and when you exit you can only go one way what a pain in the but that being said i like hot coffee and they are best of all the starbucks when it comes to hot coffee doesn t matter what time of day the coffee is always hot and the people are on top of their jobs

i understand the need to train staff but come on there were two staff here at in the evening with people infront of me that took over minutes orders took forever because beverages could not be made due to training on the register i ordered a midnight mocha frap and asked for no whipped cream yet got it with whipped cream simply from the unpleasant wait i left unhappy and didn t even have it remade as i walked outside i sipped my frap to find out it did not even have any mint in it in addition there was no place to sit inside due to customers who had long been done there beverages hogging up seat tables to surf the internet i d expect much better at starbucks

a comfortable clean intimate space always have experienced friendly staff and positive service i ve come here many times to study or meet up with friends to chat or when giftcards were wanted to be used since the starbucks in barnes and noble at the mall does not take them chipotle subway and baskin robbins are in the same strip so catering different tastes is quite easy outdoor seating is set off to the side of the building and is more spacious then most starbucks outdoor seating areas
this is a great store i live a little far from here but work in the area and this is my favorite stop on my way in to work always brightens up my day and the employees are always pleasant and kind

i doubt this review would ever be a candidate for a review of the day but who knows there s always a first time for anything right in any case while visiting my former college roommate in the irish channel last month i was comforted to see this starbucks a couple of blocks away on washington and magazine street surprisingly i found locating starbuckses in general to be difficult in new orleans especially considering that there are tons of really nice cafes and independently owned joints in the french quarter and along magazine street this particular starbucks however served as a convenient road marker to know that i was on track to finding the st charles trolley a couple more blocks down on washington street i ended up taking a small detour here while walking to the trolley in the late morning on a weekday only to find that the place was full of people lots of people who work immediately around the area as well as students your typical workday crowd patronized the place coming from los angeles for vacation i did notice that i was the only one without a stack of papers laptops or a backpack that morning in a way i was happy i was the only one without worry about work or studying and sat around observing the new orleans southern style architecture here at this starbucks and as is the beauty of franchises you get a consistent product no matter where you are and the hazelnut macchiato here was no exception and tasted as fine as anywhere else the baristas here provided a high level of customer service as i noticed that they were keeping busy sweeping the floors in the main dining room area when there was finally a lull in the queue in a separate incident one of them didn t flinch or give a weird look at a patron who returned a partially drunk coffee in fact they were really happy about replacing the drink the patron may or may not have realized that it was not to her liking until about halfway through and most people if they were in the barista s shoes would probably have made a look gossip later or show a hint of attitude none here and i was impressed at the restraint and professionalism the setup of this particular starbucks is elongated the front desk is parallel to washington street the long side of the rectangle shape of the coffee house s layout there s a bit of an issue with seating arrangements inside because it gets pretty narrow as you walk towards the rear of the store as if you re walking down the store with washington street to your right if it gets a bit too claustrophobic for you you can always do what many others did that day and take a seat outside thankfully i like to think i brought the california weather with me that week so it was totally enjoyable to actually sit outside in a typically hot and humid time of year

well i love coffee and i love to have a cup of coffee while i sit back and relax with a book i also love to study at my local starbucks location the staff at the jasper ave location knows my drink better then i do i m not kidding i ve recently tried to switch to decaf but sometimes i forget to tell them that but the guy who usually makes my drink asks me if i want it decaf and i thank him for reminding me if you like to people watch i think this is the best location to do it it s in downtown so the streets are busy and so is the store i m not the only regular that comes in all the time it s nice to see the friendly faces of these strangers who feel like they know you because they see you all the time the staff is also really friendly i end up joking with one of the guys while i place my order he usually crakes a joke at me as i walk off without receiving my muffin i forget that i ordered one if you are going to grab some goodies may i suggest the lemmon poppy seed loaf the raspberry lemmon loaf the buttermilk blueberry muffin and because it only comes out at christmas try a piece of the bliss bar the jasper ave location can get pretty busy so if you want to sit and study you need to come early in the morning or after the lunch rush the place is pretty busy but it s clean the staff does a great job keeping up with the cleaning and reloading of sleeves lids and flavored powders if you are the type of person whom can t study with too much noise then bring earphones and study to your own music to drown out the sounds of people talking they do have internet and if your starbucks card is registered then you can use the internet for free for two hours at a time it doesn t cost you anything to register your card like a gift card and you get other benefits

a much better setup than the typical starbucks with a huge open area and clean easy living and studying atmosphere that feels so welcome this is what we need in any good coffee shop especially at these insane prices i am not a fan of starbucks continuously hiking prices without improving incredigent quality nor support their corporate tax avoidance through sneaky politics forcing us average americans to compensate out of our pockets for their business trucks even thought they are a company started and run by the red white and blue i do enjoy their incredible smartphone app which is very intuitive and offers all the necessary options for ordering but again the prices are not fair at all considering the massive amounts of sugar and overprocessed ingredients found in many of the menu items three of us did go out of our usual addiction to get a hold of the pumpkin cream which did us right and a dragon fruit refresher which continues to be one of the few redeeming qualities here that i enjoy every time i try it extra fruity and exotic actual pieces not too sweet and great hot day sip i would love to see starbucks become a more corporate steward showing others how to balance extreme popularity and mature responsible business practices

i am a big fan of the starbucks chain in general when i worked on political campaigns these became my unofficial offices they have comfy furniture free internet and nice music playing in the background i have never felt pressured to buy anything or leave a starbucks no matter how long i have spent there it is a great place to have a one on one meeting prepare yourself for a presentation or just catch up on work between meetings my fun starbucks tip join the rewards program it is free cost you absolutely nothing but it does provide you with at least one free drink a year discounts through out the year and every th food or beverage item is free if you buy regular coffee iced tea or iced coffee there are free refills with the card for your whole visit which just contributes to my willingness to stay there for hours on end extra tip they count the whole purchase as one purchase towards your free item so split each purchase into individual items i think starbucks is moving away from this and will start counting the items on one receipt individually but they haven t yet this particular starbucks is very small which is why i am only giving it stars the parking lot is hard to maneuver around in and it only has a handful of tables it only has one gender neutral bathroom but the staff are fantastic friendly people they always get my drink order right i have seen them handle some really difficult people and always keep their cool if you like starbucks this is one to check out or if you are looking for a coffee shop in the area where you can get some work done this is a good place for that too

i haven t figured out why this starbucks isn t rated very well now that i ve been a dozen times to this particular location i think i can safely say it s met my needs just fine i have the mobile app and am always getting different offers to try new things and i generally go for them unless i m just trying to take a quick shot of espresso and get on with my day the various offers on the app are to try new things and you re rewarded bonus stars which can later be redeemed for food and drinks trying new things and earning free things is a win win for me thanks to the offers i ve discovered some teavana tea flavors i really like peach green tea and mango black tea and the new almond milk and coconut milk macchiatos are fantastic the pink drink with coconut milk and strawberry acai refresher is a little sweet but delicious and just the right amount of caffeine for me before exercising i drank one about an hour before a long bike ride and it was the perfect extra boost the sandwiches are also delicious in the morning when you re in the mood for a quick and hot most important meal of the day biggest plus to me is i live within walking distance and i order it on the app and walk up straight to the mobile orders and grab my stuff and am on my way blows my mind more people don t do that the place is usually pretty packed inside and relatively packed outside so i can see if you re looking for a place to plug in and work for a while it s not ideal possibly hard at times to find work space i imagine in the busier hours once in a blue a milk or something will be out in the little drink prep area and you ll have to wave an employee down to refill but who really gets bent out of shape about that it s a busy place for me the ease of ordering and quality of what i get is all i care about and this location has done good by me

the system was down today and couldn t take money that s okay they gave me my coffee and did so with a smile the lady ahead of me was a complete douche she was all cranky about it that s okay douche lady i tipped them and will continue to go to this star bucks minus one virtual star for not having a drive through in safeway for my lazy moments plus one virtual star for the employees being fabulous i love you to the moon and back coffee i mean starbucks

love all the employee s here i always do drive thru because my dog gets a puppachino they started this little delight for finn a few of the girls have taken pic s of him are always happy to see him know his name service coffee are always great

the coffee here is consistently awful and just not up to the standard of other starbucks i always get a brewed coffee and it tastes burnt and bitter every time i can t imagine what the espresso drinks taste like that aren t loaded with milk and sugar also it has a tiny cramped parking lot that makes it difficult to get in and out of parking spots due to the drive thru line

i ve always been a home brew coffee kinda girl so it s a rarity when i venture into a starbucks however my boyfriend is a huge fan so we decided to go on saturday after staring at the menu completely overwhelmed for what seemed like an eternity i decided to try the mocha light frappuccino it was the most delicious thing i ve ever drank it was a cold silky combination of mocha and chocolate a grande only has calories too in my eyes that s worth raving over

you almost never see this location without a line in the drive thru or a full cafe this is the place in the irv where folks gather for business meetings after school study sessions sewing circles and book clubs you ll find a cornucopia of people here wait times here are sometimes longer than other locations sometimes suspiciously long when after what seems like ten years i only see one beverage handed over and occasionally a group of rowdy teenagers will interrupt gossip time with your best girlfriend but outside of that there s little here to frown upon the place is cute and well kept and the baristas are friendly enough obviously the drinks and treats don t stand out from any other generic starbucks certainly there are other locations i could travel to that would lessen my wait time but it s really the convenience to my home that keeps me coming back time and time again

i ve had better service at any dmv posted hours claimed that they open up at a but there were two very leisurely employees milling about preparing to open until about a once they did open to a crowd of people anxiously awaiting their lattes the expresso maker was broken instead of having an ounce of sympathy or customer service the two employees proceeded to shame anyone who inquired as to what the issue was horrendously poor exposure for starbucks

the baristas here are all really friendly and my drink always comes out just how i want it the parking lot is a nightmare though forget about turning left into there i sit through lights sometimes and once you re in there it s so tiny but the starbucks itself is a solid one

my favorite starbucks location in reno the baristas are friendly and my order is always correct easy to get through the drive thru or inside always clean inside too nice seating for sitting with friends

one of the top rated staff locations i felt like my presence mattered at this location i tried their new pb j lunch box for a healthy alternative to fast food menus it was excellent with a nice fresh half sandwich apple slices fresh and crispy carrots cucumber with cheese and chocolate covered raisins it was satisfying

i have been visiting this starbucks now for about years due to my location of work as you would figure i have become a familiar face and so have some of the workers i have not had a bad experience and don t believe i will clark and ali are two of the people who remember me all the time and remember my drink orders the customer service they provide goes well and above what they have to do
cool employees that work quickly and efficiently definitely one of the best starbuck s i ve been to

beautiful location friendly baristas and quality coffee what s not to love baristas handle the often large crowds pretty well and very professionally i know i m impressed ps i m totally crushing on that cute blonde barista with tattoos

the worst starbucks i ve ever visited not that any are good but this one is especially bad i always ask for less syrup because their drinks are sickeningly sweet they can never get this right not once have they ever made a drink the way i ask i will never be back

walking up to starbucks at am some weeks ago from a full table outside i heard vagina pussy pussy foot chlamydia wtf a minute later i realized that they were playing a game like taboo or catch phrase apparently they re always there good times though i still wonder what that word was yes i m writing yet another star review for a starbucks i mean it s hard to give a place that s open any other rating plus they ve got cute attentive baristas ready to serve you a tasty drink any hour of the day you can t beat that definitely my starbucks of choice when i m in tampa sidenote if you re going to sit outside use bug spray in the scant few minutes that i sat outside to people watch i got four mosquito bites on my leg

wow this might be one of the best starbucks locations i ve ever been to the inside is so spacious and there s a large patio this branch has nitro cold brew and all of the regular drinks you would expect there s tons of parking too and if you live nearby it s a short walk the inside is very clean and the service was great i m definitely coming back here next time i m in boise

this location is good but the employee turn over is fairly high which causes my drink order to come out wrong i normally get green tea frap with skim milk one classic pump and no whip for some reason my last two had coffee bean grinds in it not a happy camper sine they increased prices but i love studying here

i have seen some customers get pretty picky at this starbucks and never once did the workers give a hard time to anyone they are fast super nice and make all the coffee correctly sweet ladies and men wish they had more eating and no lines whenever you go in but it s wonderful to see the starbucks on campus this starbucks is always filled with students we actually lost out phone here and one of the workers picked it up called us back and told us he would hold it at the register until we came back what better service is that amazing my coffee was made perfectly and even though there was a line there really wasn t a wait can t compliment this starbucks enough great job

what an excellent starbucks yes we have quite a few already within a mike radius but this one has the best layout and furniture according to the barista they just opened around april high ceilings give it a light and happy feel especially coupled with the light wood furniture there s black and gold wallpaper on the side that match the furniture perfectly with the warm lighting overhead all of this makes for an overall soft look there are plenty of seating options this is ideal for the laptop people and social people there are around wheelchair accessible tables that seat four people two very long high tables that seat people each one high table that seats four one long couch with tables around comfy lounge chairs and stools at the bar where drinks are handed out outlets are everywhere what s nice is there s the standard prong outlet but also two spots to put phone charger cords in great for my iphone and laptop both customer service seems solid so far concern currently the potholes in the driveway from into this shopping plaza is littered with tiny jagged potholes it s really bad so drive slow this is the only reason why this place does not get all the stars you d think starbucks would pressure who controls the shopping plaza to make things right for their grand opening month i ve kept it at stars since this is just my first visit and the pothole issue and i ll update later if i think it s stellar enough to get

this is the most inefficient and just plain awful starbucks i have ever been to they ve never gotten my order correct and all it is only an iced vanilla coffee with heavy cream i went there once and i had to go back in the store three different times and i still left with a drink that didn t taste how it normally does from all other locations i only go here when it is convenient as far as location don t even consider the drive thru unless you re prepared to wait thirty minutes for your incorrect order

i don t come here often but i had a gift card from last christmas and happy that i did because i was able to try a delicious drink that i think could become a favorite of mine during a sunday drive my husband and i decided to stop at this location for some coffee soo the drive through line was super long but to our surprise we got through it really quick my husband had the carmel frappe and i had the dragon drink i honestly didn t know what to expect from the drink but being that i didn t have to actually pay for it i said what the heck lol the dragon drink it light refreshing and not overwhelming at all i expected the coconut milk to be a little stronger the flavors combined really well and yes i would order this drink again my only hesitation would be getting it from a different location because as we all know different locations make the drinks different and they never really taste the same our customer service experience gets stars as well as the overall experience

i love starbucks it doesn t matter to me which location any and all are great for me caramel macchiato grande is my favorite but there are so many that i have tried and liked i enjoy the comfortable feel of the locations i enjoy just sitting there sipping on my drink enjoying my laptop or android tablet sometimes i just like to sit and read my kindle while i enjoy the peace much like a library but you can drink here lol some say that they are going to start serving alcohol i don t like that idea personally i don t want it to turn into a bar atmosphere if they get into this business they need to branch off and name is something else anyway i enjoy starbucks

worst starbucks i have ever been to please do not go here if you want your coffee order done right my order was messed up about four times and the cake pop i got was old the barista was so rude about remaking the drinks and i get it they were busy but she felt the need to stand there and argue with me about whether she called out the name of whose drink was whose when she set them out these workers do not care about their customers honestly i just should ve gotten my money back instead of even getting my drink remade for all the trouble i went through i usually don t write reviews unless a place is really bad so trust me on this and do not go there

the staff at starbucks is so well trained i have had starbucks for over twenty five years i love your coffee but love your staff at speedway and country club in tucson az more they are a great and certainly make me feel like i am having coffee at a friends home instead of a corporate store this staff should be the training store for all of starbucks thank you starbucks for wonderful coffee and thank you everyone at my favorite store in tucson az carman wong

i really enjoy working here when i need a change of scenery and love the easy access via car bike public transit etc although i live close enough to walk i am sometimes skeptical about walking with my laptop phone etc so the option to drive and park for free keeps me coming back it feels like a neighborhood coffee shop even though it s a chain store the baristas are always super friendly and a few of them have made an effort to remember my name my favorite is the berry hibiscus refresher unlike anything at any other coffee shop love it and will be back
extremely slow service staff lacks product knowledge they were also put off several products and claimed that they could not brew a blonde roast coffee due to the time of day
they need to hire more than three people to work i should not have to wait minutes to have my order taken only go to starbucks because someone gave me a gift card over priced slow service

what a great location i recently started working in the area and have been through here every day for a week and am never disappointed my coffee is always perfect and everyone is super friendly oh and if you play pok mon you can battle on the gym located right next to the drive thru while you wait
my first time to do a drive thru for my coffee it was a long wait but worth it just to get my caffeine fix and i got a free car air freshener yay
it s starbucks you all know and love it great seasonal drinks location is friendly and speedy for your average cup of joe this is the place

this place have kicked up there game recently the lines are moving much faster now i m basically in here everyday now the workers are amazing they all finally got my name right yay so many drinks that i love but can t get all the time bc of the crazy calories salted caramel frap mocha delicious i love the salitness and sweetness double chocolate frap with the choc whipped cream yum white choc mocha mmm hahaha i could prob list the whole menu but i won t oh the breakfast sandwiches and pastries are wonderful as well give those a try
i go to this location on a regular basis the staff is consistently friendly and helpful definitely recommend this location

virginia who was working the drive through today is probably the best employee that they could ever ask for on the customer service end unbelievably sweet on top of that she knew the name of the person in front of me and knew what they would be ordering before they ordered it she just had it ready never let go of her

the baristas are very friendly and welcoming every day it can get crowded but the line moves pretty well yes the parking stinks but lucky for me i can walk here from my house this is a go to study spot for a lot of local students including myself get there early if you want a seat to study at for a long period of time

this starbucks is so slow if you want to grab and go this is not the one to go to waiting in line over minutes
omg i love this location friendly staff fast service cleannnnn beautiful drinks are made here time and effort put into each one
i am a starbucks junkie no doubt about it this place is newly remodeled it s the perfect place to stop before you shop in the nearby stores they have a drive thru to get your quick fix

not sure what s wrong with this location maybe they don t have enough people working maybe it s too small for as many customers as they have but the woman and guy who were running the registers were having some sort of a tiff i couldn t tell if the guy was being a jerk or if the woman was being dense or a little bit of both in any case it was really obvious that they were not getting along and it was really awkward also they had a display table of mugs and coffee set up right inside the door and there was another table set so close to it that someone could not sit at the table without customers who were leaving not hitting them or the display table and it just made the whole area by the registers and door really cramped very slow service

the baristas here are super friendly with an asian male being my favorite person i keep forgetting his name the service is prompt and when it isn t prompt i got my coffee for free my current complicated drink is always perfect triple grande salted caramel mocha with soy no whip a couple of weeks ago some nice person paid for my coffee cars ahead of me in some pay it forward movement it s always a nice experience at this place and i just have not one complaint see you guys tomorrow

cute place to grab a drink with a friend but be prepared to wait because i waited min for a passion tea and my buddy waited for a smoothie and this visit was not during peak hours stars because they got my drink right on the first try

quiet little starbucks which is usually not the case in most starbucks the two baristas here are very nice and attentive got my cafe americano and it s pretty good what more can i say good service here

this place is one of the newer starbucks in the area so facility wise it is big and clean i love how they have the cold brew and nitro cold brew ready to go every day other places i ve been to runs out by the afternoon the staff is ok haven t had too much interaction with them but they seem nice enough i like the big circular table in which is standing height for an average human being height is it great to get some work done while you are standing put s a lot less stress on the back the bathroom is pretty clean at all times kinda surprised for a new facility like this they do not have an automatic flush parking is great they have a huge lot where you can park i think one of the biggest pluses to this location is that it is going to be part of a strip mall they ll have new things coming in so if you need to take a break and walk around you re going to have that option there is also a cvs down miles down so you can walk and get some snacks and such if you like overall good spot good facility

first time i ever remember asking for a refund but after waiting almost minutes for my order of one coffee i d reached the end of my limit it should never take minutes to get an order from a well managed starbucks and that to me is the issue at this one very poorly managed i ordered on the mobile app from my home at am the app told me my order would be ready at at around with my coffee order still back in the line i asked for a refund being busy is not an excuse if you know you are going to be busy you plan for it with proper staffing the music in the lobby was very loud from where i was standing if my name had been called there was not way i would be able to hear it from employees calling names at normal volume level again just a total lack of awareness of the manager on duty today it will be a long time before i return to this location i learned today they don t really appreciate me as a customer so i ll take my business elsewhere

barista crew is efficient and polite if you come here during the day expect tables to be taken up by mcewan students and business meetings not a lot of seating but a nice space none the less large windows let in a lot of natural light which makes this location welcoming

staff is very efficient and know their stuff the downstairs is a bit crowded but they have a very large upstairs that makes for a great place for a book club or poetry reading i used to live around the corner from this starbucks and it was the only place i could go very early in the morning to sit and read or write in peace the upstairs windows are a great people watching spot for the loony tunes that frequent south street

i ve been coming here recently to work at home and am enjoying it for the most part every time i arrive though i m hoping there s a seat near the front of the building if you don t find one there you re stuck in the back area that is quite dark it s not bad to be in the back it s just not as cozy to sit for extended periods of time service is normal and basically it s a convenient starbucks for all the normal reasons wifi location etc

i gave myself a day to think carefully about writing this i have been to this location several times i can honestly say most of the staff there is pleasant to deal with i may have a coffee addiction that said the past few times have gone there drinks have been wrong the manager is rude i get anyone can have a bad day but it seems every time i go in is a bad day for her i love location since right by my house however i will not be returning there for coffee as long as she is there
very quick service i walked inside i am having the chicken and artichoke sandwich warmed up i am drinking passionfruit lemonade tea very clean

the only reason i rate this store star is because i come in at am first person in the store and sit at the handicap table as i have a lot of paperwork to spread out and the small tables are too small then a worker comes up and tells me there is a handicapped customer that comes in and sits at that table i think no problem probably someone in a wheelchair or something i ll gladly move for them but no a tall very capable man walks in and says i need to move which i was in the process of because that s his table i get you re a regular but i m still a paying customer who was there before you and you have no physical need for the wheelchair table more than i do and i don t appreciate the employee telling me where i can and cannot sit ridiculous
went through drive yesterday service was perfect thank you very upbeat and order was perfect

they were very dismissive they got my order wrong and when my husband tried to confirm our order they dismissed him at the drive thru window when i tried calling the phone number listed for this store they answered the phone and said it was a cvs drive thru the second time i called it went to an automated voice message they did not give me a receipt or ask if i wanted one so i couldn t go back to get my correct order i ve been to this store multiple times and each time they either mess my order up or are rude there was even one time they messed my order up and when i told them about it they acted like they didn t i go to starbucks regularly and i am new to the area this is not what i expect from a starbucks in terms of customer service and food not sure if my review will make a difference but it s just sad that we have to continue to deal with this every time
whoa definitely my favorite starbucks i drive out of my way just to see mckenzie she always greets me with a smile and most of the time remembers my name and what i like to order

the other starbucks in hermitage i was there saturday morning while my car was being worked on this one doesn t seem to be as busy as the other starbucks in hermitage i do wish they had a larger patio

probably the worst starbucks i ve been to the service was horrible we came in and placed our order with no one in line in front of us we ordered iced beverages latte a donut and hot food item the iced drinks we re ready right away to be expected we waited another seriously minutes for the latte both lattes were terrible they were weak the hot one totally watered down the vanilla almond milk latte was also weak with zero flavor after waiting more minutes and witnessing everyone in line behind us getting their hot food i approached the woman working at the oven and politely asked her if there she had my egg bites because i thought they might have forgotten the order the manager immediately butt in and said in a snappy voice that it was coming and they had a a lot of food orders i told him i d just seen everyone who ordered behind us had their hot food already so i wanted to make sure i wasn t forgotten he then told me it was coming i said ok and as i turned to walk away he started shaking his head at me in a snarky way my husband witnessed the head shake as well if you don t want to be in the food industry don t work there totally unprofessional i m going to peet s coffee

this location has the same menu as most this is a very small store they had plenty of employees and they were fine as far as doing their jobs however i never saw a smile the reason i am giving them stars is the floor was dirty the line floor where they were working was filthy and the cream sugar area was dirty with overflowing trash must be in need of a new manager if it were my store some heads would roll it s christmas time would a smile be too much to ask for

perfect last chance yummy coffee stop before dragging through security and boarding your flight or the perfect pick me up after arrival or while waiting to pick someone up the baristas are speedy and very nice

rude service at counter unfriendly and just miserable greeting website says they have unicorn drink yet staff said they didn t probably didn t want to make it took forever to get two drinks while employees are standing around avoid at all costs
got a hot chocolate from there pretty good stuff it was a bit crowded but customer service was pleasant

awesome customer service i left one starbucks to go to this starbucks and they may good with my starbucks account i was really upset with previous store but this store really showed how much they care about their customers thank you for thanking the time and explaining the starbucks reward program as busy as they were today

majority of the time i am going to starbucks is on the way to work in the morning it s early not always the best mood the people at starbucks truly do brighten your day from the moment you order in the drive through with the excitement in their voice and even the small talk they make at the window

at first glance it s easy to miss this starbucks driving down olive boulevard in creve coeur it is in an unassuming building but directed right off the main road there is plenty of parking as you pull in and the shop has two entrances the staff was super efficient friendly and helpful this seems to be a necessity as the location was in the middle of their morning rush they got my order as i was waiting in line didn t mess anything up and had my coffee and pastry ready in lightning speed plenty of seating choices with couches and tables so i decided to do a little work all in all didn t expect such a big starbucks in this building but ended up enjoying my experience i would definitely visit this location again as i was able to get a lot of work done all while enjoying a hot coffee with free refills

i have been coming to this starbs for years i have been here in the early morning midday and evening and the staff is always very friendly and efficient for a few months i went in for my coffee around the same time always using my app and found that the staff began to recognize me nonetheless the staff is what makes this place work starbucks coffee is the same wherever you go but it s the people that make me come back
extremely slow service it will take you at least minutes in the drive thru not any quicker to go inside

starbucks are a dime a dozen in this city and they re all basically the same yeah the coffee isn t the most amazing coffee in the world yeah the food is all pre packaged what sets this one apart from all the others is the baristas since i work in the empire building i visit this location once a day sometimes twice sometimes three times please stop judging me all the people behind the counter know my name and know what i drink at what time of day i appreciate the fact that even though i m one of hundreds in any given day they still remember who i am

terrible only people ahead of me but took forever because i order the spinach feta egg wrap which they forgot about until i reminded them after waiting for a bit ordered an iced coffee but got hot i was frustrated and didn t want to wait for them to make me a new one so i took it nice people but slow and ditsy
waited min for an iced coffee people came and went and i still couldn t get my drink terrible service

i ve been meaning to change up my study spot so i found this starbucks located off of rt on fellowship rd there s really no other starbucks nearby except the one in the moorestown mall or about a minute drive to marlton or cherry hill there s also a limited amount of coffee shops cafes and potential study places in the area that have tables seating and free wifi i came in on a weekday around am and the drive thru line was through and out of the parking lot because of this i was scared there would be no spots left inside to study luckily as i picked up my espresso a small table with seats opened the study area was filled with people on laptops doing work i had an espresso and all the staff were friendly and welcoming they did mess up my order slightly but i was able to get it easily fixed just seems like the workers are in a rush i don t blame them they had soooo many customers in the drive thru if you re looking for a quiet place to get work done this is not your place the room fills with sounds from the kitchen beeping espresso making fizzing and individuals on phone calls this was not a problem for me as i work fine with background sounds most likely i will be back to this location since it has great hours and a clean study area

you can t ask for better service the staff is dedicated to making sure your drink is perfectly made and given with a kind smile to boot i love anytime i go into a business and the staff is happy and playful and this starbucks obviously has a great team and good leadership because they were enjoying their work something rare today then there was the order very berry hibiscus tea for me my daughter opted for a coffee creation only she could come up with and they obliged her writing her own order on her cup yes she is that type and connor got his pump only latte that every other starbucks makes with even when he specifies happy customers for sure

really liked the space inside this starbucks i often use starbucks to study but some locations don t offer a good amount of table space this starbucks has a decent amount of tables chairs employees are nice they cleaned the bathrooms twice while i was there they also have a drive thru which is a great perk

great looking starbucks friendly staff the clover machine is delicious i sat down and asked the baristas some questions about it after buying my regular coffee and one of the baristas michi offered me a sample will definitely be back to try more clover coffees

the drink and food were on point and came out quickly despite the line of customers in front of me it is a long store so it s pretty skinny and doesn t have a lot of places to sit luckily most people were getting their items to go so we snagged a seat at their bar area and ate there outside customers were smoking which is not allowed at the starbucks in our hometown so we had to stay inside to avoid the grossness the counter wasn t clean but they were busy so i get it you need a code for their single bathroom so be sure to ask when you are in line so you don t have to go back up and ask
i have to update and add two other employees man and woman that i ve been seeing in the drive thru during the morning because they are wonderful it s a great start to my day because of these two

the low review is primarily due to the service that has gone significantly downhill i usually stop at this starbucks pretty regularly before work this starbucks has the slowest drive thru of any of them in town yesterday after the line not moving for minutes i just left this morning there weren t many cars but enough that my drink should have been ready when i pulled up instead it was another minutes after my card was processed before i was handed my drink just go inside you say it isn t any faster and i ve had them put my order on the drive thru counter it took me minutes to get someone s attention to grab it for me and the point of a drive thru is for it to be quicker than getting out of your vehicle walking inside waiting in line ordering waiting for your drink and then walking back to your car getting in and driving away they need to take the service in the drive thru and inside up a notch
this is a low stress starbucks not alot of lines quick service

so years ago i used to live on starbucks daily even visiting their locations multiple times in a single day i was literally addicted beginning with my first hot caramel macchiato sweetened with splenda i became such a nut that i would literally specify exactly how i wanted it a hot venti sugar free caramel macchiato with milk splenda extra foam extra caramel drizzle served with a large straw yuppers i m that kind of crazy lol and if tasted wrong i d have my hubby go back in and have them remake it you didn t want to be behind me in line lol but i had to change my caffeine intake for my health so we stopped going i m sure a lot of employees around the locations in this area were happy lol anyway for the last year or so i discovered organic green tea and drink that daily at home st with splenda until july when i found out i was diabetic have hypothyroidism so i researched and found that stevia artificial sweeteners are better for my health so yesterday for the st time since i asked hubby to go thru the closest starbucks drive thru before we went food shopping i didn t know what to order until i leaned over my hubby asked the friendly female voice coming thru where you order if they had a hot green tea she said yes then i asked what artificial sweeteners they had she listed a few until i asked if they had stevia i was delighted to hear sure do pulling up to the window the friendly girl handed had my tea all ready let me know she mixed in the whole earth stevia w monk fruit sweetener and also gave me extra on the side in case i wanted more my large straw star amazing starbucks experience a super yummy healthy tea for me made perfectly i highly recommend this starbucks my order

kudos to the baristas on my last visit still squinting against the cosmic rays of covid s corona they ve opened the doors but only to the extent of the long arm of the law one giant step from the entryway to the interior s antisocial barrier waiting for service at a nearby car dealership whose coffee maker was removed against fear of the virus sent me over the hill through invisible woods to grab a cuppa the buck s brew is more to my liking anyway the barista s voice smiled from beneath the facemask as she retrieved my mobile order the drive through lane was surprisingly empty and no one allowed inside so service was immediate the green to go stopper so often out of stock in busier pasts had been pre inserted by a magical plasticized hand condiments are also banned to public fingers so you ll need to ask specifically for anything you d normally manage on your own at the walkup counter yet a cheery and successful visit was had by all your mileage will vary like its sibling locations service varies with each crew and visit it s still a starbucks cookie cutter chain store experience but we must all do our part to keep the beans brewing mischief managed
