behind the location at the cheshire inn on western side of forest park this is probably the most unique starbucks in st louis service is quick the staff are personable even when slammed under the morning rush and the atmosphere is a little less corporate in feel there s little mistaking that you re in a starbucks when you step in the door but it s also distinctly the central west end starbucks skim the reviews or google maps and you ll find just about all that you need to know for a great visit to this walkable store there s no dedicated parking lot or pickup spot but there a few sturdier places to lock up a bike on the block drivers do have options though there s a public garage above the schlafly library on euclid and metered parking along the street free street parking is often available to the east of the shop on maryland ave and there s a paid parking lot across the street too there s no drive thru but mobile orders are usually accepted the location isn t that large but does have a good mix of semi communal seating small tables sidewalk seating and a couple of more comfortable chairs if there s really any complaint with the store it s the minor irritation of its tendency to sell out of products whether it s blonde roast breakfast sandwiches or nitro cold brew each of which have been unavailable at least once during my random stops in over the past year i ve never had that affect an app order but if you have your mind set on a particular item it s probably best to order ahead

here is my covid update for this location they opened up yesterday for the first time since the stay safe at home order unfortunately i finished up shopping a bit too late to make it out yesterday so i was determined to get my very missed strawberry acai refresher today i went ahead and ordered on their mobile app that estimated the order would be ready in about mins i was running a bit behind but when i got there my order was ready and the whipped cream was still on the frapp we got drinks total they greet you at two tables upon arrival don t expect to go in they will meet you right in front one table is for walk up orders and the other for pick ups ordered ahead on the mobile app their baristas are wearing masks for our safety and would most likely appreciate their patrons doing the same fortunately i did bring my mask as i did not know what kind of setup to expect without having a drive thru at this location it went smoothly abd was extremely convenient our order was perfect and all of our drinks were made just right please pay attention to their very simple setup and things should go off without a hitch they have markers on the floor that encourage separation and social distancing while you wait they were sold out of a lot of food they are a very busy location and this is pretty typical sometimes they don t get to update an item is out before you place your order so please be kind and be patient they are always happy to replace or refund your money and take care of it very quickly so now that you know go in and get that caffeine fix you ve been missing just bring a mask and be kind we are all in this together

i love this starbucks for so many reasons but mainly because the people there genuinely seem to enjoy working there the seating area is also larger than most other starbucks in city limits and everything in here is well maintained and very clean never had a problem with drink consistency or the time it takes to make them i ve definitely been to a couple starbucks along my travels where they have no communication between employees leaving my marked cup sitting on the counter for those few extra minutes while i m trying to rush out the door luckily this is my neighborhood starbucks and i m fortunate to have such friendly employees greeting me every time i walk in

alex and jade were not just baristas for me they were my friends too we used to talk about hats yoga and what not i haven t found anyone that knows my coffee better than asked did i loved the music too and very often would just work from the cafe itself thanks guys

had the worst customer service experience here i asked the barista if my drink had the right shots of espresso in it because it was rather pale without answering they took my drink back and gave me attitude for having to remake it the manager demanded i tasted the remake and when i said no she demanded again i m extremely appalled by this behavior and hope the managers behavior does not reflect the corporation

must read starbuck s cares about you i unfortunately was in accident out front of this store and after the reports were taken and the cars towed away i entered to store to try and get warm and truthfully process all that had happened just a few minutes earlier while i waited for my wife to pick me up a cup a coffee i thought would be really nice so i went to order my usual as per normal the employees asked how i was doing and i shared that i had just experienced an accident and was waiting for my wife to come get me they were generous enough to listen and offer their support as i explained the situation to top it off they offered the coffee on the house yes maybe just a free cup of coffee but man it meant more than a oz caffeine boost to me thank you to everyone in the store who were so generous and if you ve lasted long enough to read this review i hope you ll consider starbucks for your next coffee craving
stopped at drive through at pm and recording said they were closed pm on a wednesday seriously sign says pm somebody wanted to go home early

because i love making coffee and home and i have a certain few fave brands i seek when i am craving the joe i don t stumble into starbucks often on days i am rushing i am thankful for a drive thru quick breakfast options the reliability of a chain coffee joint good to know that every starbucks from the hudson to the bay you re gonna get what you get no matter where you are yay i just must mention this location th keystone i m gonna betcha that this is one of the busiest in town now to speak of the baristas drive thru emcees the staff are young exceptional previously the gentlemen were upbeat and friendly second to last visit our barista was gracious and polite every time they are quick todaaaaay sing that the young lady that took my order literally sang my order back to me and made sure i would have a great day thanks

my favorite hot starbucks espresso beverage is the venti carmel macchiato i admit i m very picky about my order but it s not like it s a cent cup of coffee i was soo blown away tonight as the barista made my carmel macchiato absolutely perfectly delicious and on point my hubby and i frequent this starbucks location drive thru whenever we can hubby just orders the venti pike w cream splenda he s not hard to please at all if i wasn t with him he d settle for a cheap regular coffee from the donut place i on the other hand am not a fan of coffee so when we are out together it s starbucks only lol i order the hot venti sugar free carmel macchiato with pumps of the sugar free vanilla syrup extra carmel drizzle in the cup splenda frothed milk just shot of espresso not the that comes with this and with a straw to sip from yes i know it sounds like a lot but i am a diabetic and i also can t have a lot of caffeine so i have to be specific stars from the barista tonight my macchiato was perfection thank you so much

the staff at this location are always sweet and quick i ve spent hours studying chairing with friends and grabbing a coffee to go and every time i m pleasantly surprised by the customer service on days they mess something up they quickly and apologetically apologize for it the milk and creamer at the front is a little odd but works ok with the space i recommend relaxing the patio and people watching in the afternoon

the service at this starbucks is super slow from the moment you walk in you feel as if something fishy is up with the store the glass on the front door is cracked with no tape or warning signs safety hazard i know vandalism happens but make sure your customers are not going to get near it or use the door next the line was only three people deep me being that third person and it took a good minutes to get to the front the three workers were doing the following one was making drinks by herself the next one was on the register trying to ring up orders and she seemed a little distracted chatting five of the ten minutes away with her friend who was buying one item the last guy was chatting away with the girl on the register distracting her from her job after we ordered our drinks we waited another minute for them to arrive now i know this is typical of a crazy morning a lunchtime rush or any busy period in the day but none of this was happening when we got our drinks we asked for one cardboard sleeve for our own cup that we brought the girl making drinks was not only rude about it to us she was rude about it to the lady in front of us about the same thing a couple of suggestions to the manager owner first put a manager in that team second if the cardboard sleeves are that big of a hassle put out a dispenser of them and customers won t have to ask for them we were about to spend x what we did spend but since the service was terrible we decided not to and almost walked out and went to our preferred store about two miles away
